mlb_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 8.80 K/9 over 18 appearances (18 starts)
Minnesota Twins lineup pitch-type K matchup neutral (2169 pitches): curves 34% mix: 26% whiff, 30% K-ending PA; four-seamers 29% mix: 19% whiff, 18% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal curves 34%, four-seamers 29%, changeups 24% with 29.5% whiffs/swing
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 66.1%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 34.8%; Under history hit rate 49-65 (75.4%)

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 6.92 K/9 over 18 appearances (18 starts)
Philadelphia Phillies lineup pitch-type K matchup vulnerable (2307 pitches): four-seamers 46% mix: 27% whiff, 28% K-ending PA; sweepers 22% mix: 38% whiff, 36% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal four-seamers 46%, sweepers 22%, changeups 17% with 25.2% whiffs/swing
Venue Great American Ball Park, park factor 1.05
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 67.7%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 27.0%; Under history hit rate 60-94 (63.8%)

wnba_3pm.method: WNBA 3PM props using 3PA volume, shrinkage-adjusted 3P%, season/history profiles, L10 form, venue, opponent, injury, and consensus gates

key_factors: WNBA3PM consensus gate required before BET/LEAN publication
Consensus gate rejected publication: three_pointers_made has not cleared 70%
picks.reason: WNBA3PM is research-only until the active season/history consensus gate qualifies this 3PM signal (three_pointers_made has not cleared 70%).
